title: rosa gallica var. cristata
intro: Rosa gallica var. cristata, also known as the French Crimped Rose or Climbing Gallica Rose, is a type of rose plant that is a variant of the Rosa gallica species. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Rosa gallica var. cristata include its ability to help with wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
